title: Governed Transition and Conflict Engine
description: Govern generic Enki state transitions transactionally while preserving exact before-and-after state, temporal meaning, branching, conflict, authority, rollback, recovery, and human-specific protections.
acceptance_criteria: Versioned transition contracts cover correction, refinement, supersession, retraction, reversal, expansion, restriction, context shift, confidence change, merge, split, and deprecation
Every transition binds exact before-and-after hashes, subject, context, evidence, provenance, authority, execution context, transaction, and receipt
Cycle, stale-input, contradiction, overlap, context mismatch, and authority-conflict paths fail closed
Branch, merge, split, overlap, contradiction, and competing-authority outcomes are reconstructable
Interruption produces one commit, one exact recovery, or one documented rollback
Human-specific protections remain intact through the generic transition engine

evidence.description: Sprint 10 CI passed after deterministic schema and runtime validation corrections.
Declared transition and conflict paths achieved runtime coverage.
